title: More Colors Green Screen (MCGS)
description: A mod that adds colored blocks in game like green screen, pretty helpful for content creators.
body:
Are you a **Content Creator** or **Streamer**?
Then, at sometime you wished you had a mod with _green screens_ (or other colors) in-game.
Well in that case this mod is for, **MCGS** (**more colors green screens**) adds hole new colored blocks to the game. It is easier to make videos now, without using those video/photo editor functions: Chroma Key or whatever that come bad. Now, you have lots of colors that you just place, take screenshot, put on editor, and it comes so **mutch EASIER**!


![Red Screen Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5513773316c58d6d6231f4020ec3ff33378884fb.png)


![Blue Screen Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba26656b0e9508229f814d6b5a7c0b595169eb55.png)![Green Screen Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bceb85a40b12b14cd5f541c611e45a865993dd4a.png)


I hope you enjoy it, i will be updating for more colors! **Especialista104**
